title: NeuralNet Visualizer
description: Interactive deep learning visualization tool that animates forward & backpropagation in real time. Built to make AI intuitive.

title: AlgoArena
description: Competitive DSA platform with 300+ problems, real-time code execution, and adaptive difficulty — powered by ML performance tracking.

title: SentimentStream
description: Real-time social media sentiment analysis pipeline using transformer models. Processes 10k tweets/minute with 94% accuracy.

title: DevFlow
description: Full-stack developer productivity dashboard with GitHub integration, PR analytics, and AI-powered code review suggestions.

title: Graph Pathfinder
description: Visual DSA playground for graph algorithms — Dijkstra, A*, BFS, DFS — with step-by-step animated walkthroughs.

title: ChatMind
description: LLM-powered personal knowledge base that lets you chat with your own notes, PDFs, and documents using RAG architecture.
